title: rothmannia spathicalyx
intro: Rothmannia spathicalyx, also known as the African bush tea or wild tea, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rothmannia spathicalyx include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs and colds, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Rothmannia spathicalyx can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
